title: fix(ui): add scroll to date format dropdown
ground_truth: The setup script should create (or verify the existence of) a test document and use its actual ID in the navigation URL before running browse agents.
Ensure the setup script creates at least one document in the personal workspace and uses its actual ID in the navigation URL, rather than assuming document ID 1 exists.
The setup writer should create a test document via SQL or API before the browse agent runs, rather than relying on a hardcoded document ID that may not exist in the test environment.

title: fix: prevent managers from deleting admin invitations
ground_truth: Add a setup step that inserts the 'verifyorg' organisation, a manager-role member (logged-in user), and a pending admin-role invitation before the browse agent runs.
The setup script should seed a 'verifyorg' organisation (with an admin user and a pending admin-role invitation) before the browse agent runs.
The setup script should create the 'verifyorg' organisation (and a manager user with a pending invitation) before the browse agent runs.

title: fix: missing embed direct template email validation
ground_truth: The setup_writer should generate and insert a valid direct template record with a known token into the database before the browse agent attempts to navigate to the embed URL.
The setup writer should seed a valid direct template signing token into the database before running AC tests that require navigating to embed direct URLs.

title: fix: resolve envelope editor settings ccer logic
ground_truth: The setup_writer should insert a draft document with at least one CC recipient into the test workspace database before the browse agent runs, ensuring the precondition required by the AC is satisfied.
The setup_writer should create a draft document with at least one CC recipient in the target team workspace before the browse agent runs.
The setup_writer should create a draft document with at least one CC recipient and one non-CC recipient in the test workspace before the browse agent runs.

title: fix: improve webhook execution
ground_truth: The setup script should insert at least one document in 'PENDING' or 'COMPLETED' status for the test user before the browse agent runs so the action button is present.

title: fix: template description overflow
ground_truth: The setup_writer should insert a template row with a publicDescription containing 100+ characters and no spaces (e.g. a UUID-like string repeated) so the browse agent has test data to verify text-wrapping behavior.
